name: Mark of Shadow
description: You gain a 1d4 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) and Charisma (Performance) checks. You learn the Minor Illusion cantrip and the Invisibility spell. You can cast Invisibility once per long rest without a spell slot, or use your own spell slots. You choose Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma as your spellcasting ability for these. Additionally, several illusion and stealth-themed spells are added to your spellcasting class's spell list.
